name: review-auth-middleware
prompt: I just pushed some auth middleware changes and want a review before merging. The code is in evals/fixtures/auth-middleware.ts — can you review it for bugs? Follow the bug-review workflow (parallel passes, voting, validation). Treat the file as a PR diff and review it end-to-end.
expected_output: Structured review with findings using the multi-pass voting workflow, categories, trigger scenarios, and severity ratings
assertions: Findings contain at least 3 CRITICAL or HIGH severity issues
Every finding has a non-empty triggerScenario field
No finding targets the isAdmin function
Findings use category IDs from the skill's category taxonomy
Transcript documents running multiple review passes
